properties.name: Strait of Hormuz
properties.significance: Controls access to the Persian Gulf; roughly one-third of global seaborne oil transits here

properties.name: Strait of Malacca
properties.significance: Shortest sea route between the Indian and Pacific Oceans; critical for East Asian energy imports

properties.name: Bab el-Mandeb
properties.significance: Links the Red Sea to the Gulf of Aden; key corridor for Europe-Asia trade via the Suez Canal

properties.name: Suez Canal
properties.significance: Artificial waterway connecting the Mediterranean and Red Sea; avoids routing around Africa

properties.name: Panama Canal
properties.significance: Links the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans; vital for US intercoastal and global container trade

properties.name: GIUK Gap
properties.significance: Greenland-Iceland-UK passage; strategic NATO chokepoint for monitoring Russian naval movements

properties.name: Taiwan Strait
properties.significance: Separates Taiwan from mainland China; one of the most heavily trafficked shipping lanes globally

properties.name: Strait of Gibraltar
properties.significance: Only natural passage between the Atlantic Ocean and the Mediterranean Sea

properties.name: Turkish Straits / Bosphorus
properties.significance: Connects the Black Sea to the Mediterranean via the Sea of Marmara; controls Russian warm-water access

properties.name: Danish Straits / Øresund
properties.significance: Primary access between the Baltic Sea and the North Sea; critical for Northern European trade

properties.name: Strait of Lombok
properties.significance: Alternative to Malacca for deep-draft vessels transiting between the Indian and Pacific Oceans

properties.name: Mozambique Channel
properties.significance: Separates Madagascar from mainland Africa; key route for oil tankers rounding the Cape

properties.name: Cape of Good Hope
properties.significance: Southern tip of Africa; fallback route when Suez Canal is disrupted and major oil tanker corridor

properties.name: Strait of Magellan
properties.significance: Natural passage between the Atlantic and Pacific at South America's southern tip; alternative to Cape Horn

properties.name: English Channel
properties.significance: Busiest international shipping lane in the world; connects the North Sea to the Atlantic

properties.name: Korean Strait
properties.significance: Separates Japan from the Korean Peninsula; primary route for trade between the East China Sea and Sea of Japan

properties.name: Sunda Strait
properties.significance: Separates Java and Sumatra; secondary route between the Indian Ocean and Java Sea
